text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 275 

TOT_BENE_COPAY_LBLTY_AMT 

LABEL: Total Beneficiary Copayment Liability Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The total copayment amount on a claim the beneficiary is obligated to pay for covered services. This 
amount is the total Medicaid or contract negotiated beneficiary copayment liability for covered 
services on the claim. 

SHORT NAME: TOT_BENE_COPAY_LBLTY_AMT 

LONG NAME:
